name: Steamed Shao-Mai Dumplings with Young Ginger
recipeIngredient: 1 each Scallion, thin, cut into 1-inch lengths
2 tsp Wine, Chinese, rice OR Sherry, dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the ginger and scallion in a food processor until fine.
2. Add pork, soy sauce, wine, sesame oil, salt, and pepper to the food processor and mix with several on-off pulses.
3. Scrape the mixture into a bowl and add water chestnuts. Stir in one direction until mixed.
4. Put 1 scant tablespoon of filling in the center of each wrapper.
5. Form the wrapper into a loose four-cornered hat, then press each corner towards the filling. The dumpling should now look like a cupcake.
6. Make a circle with your thumb and first finger around the middle of the dumpling and tighten gently to press the wrapper to the filling.
7. Dunk the exposed pork top into carrot cubes to decorate.
8. Steam the dumplings for 20 minutes on an oiled steamer rack and serve.
